review_instructions: verdicts: city -> zone_code -> {4 uses}. Each use cell carries permission (permitted|conditional|prohibited|unclear), confidence, cited_subsection, conditions_json, verification_note. Edit permission values in place against the ordinance, then run --apply on this file. NOTE: confidence/cited_subsection/verification_note are zone-level (the parser grounds the whole zone, not each use separately); conditions_json is null unless a use is conditional with stated terms. diagnostics holds per-city fetch coverage — check chars_combined / parser_warnings before trusting a city's verdicts.

parser_warnings: M-1B Zone has specific operating conditions for miniwarehouse/self-storage including 625-foot setback from Route 22 and required resident caretaker, classified as conditional. Other M zones reference 'warehouse uses as defined in §126-2' but do not specifically mention self-storage or mini-warehouse—classified as prohibited based on silence as to those specific use types.

Text appears to combine multiple ordinance sections, including provisions for zones not in the Franklin Township zone list (R-3.0, C-N, C-S, MF, MXD, AR-7.0); these may be from a different township section but were classified as found.
Schedule of Zone Requirements table not provided; B-I storage uses inferred from purpose statement only.
MU-3 Mixed Use Three District listed in zone districts but specific use regulations not present in provided text.
Redevelopment Overlay District incorporates separate Redevelopment Plan not included in text.
Text references Gloucester Township, NJ ordinance content despite user header stating Warren Township; classifications reflect ordinance text provided.
HC District does not enumerate self-storage; classified as prohibited by silence.
Ordinance states only 2 zoning districts in 16-3.1 but text describes many districts via §16-4 subsections; classifications based on §16-4 district sections.
Self-service storage as conditional use is detailed in §16-6.1s (referenced but not included in text).
